comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 pilot, shape D (dict->f-string url). Transcribed VERBATIM from scraper_buds.py inline CALIBER_FILTER_URLS on 2026-06-14 — the f-strings resolve to absolute URLs; stored here as paths relative to base, parity-proven byte-identical (after relativizing the resolved f-strings against base) before flip. URL-encoding preserved exactly (+ = space, %26 = &, %28/%29 = parens, numeric prefix = Bud's category id); changing it 404s. Only the 6 calibers Bud's exposes a filter URL for are here; the other 4 (380acp, 357mag, 762x39, 300blk) are picked up by the all-ammo crawl backstop, which stays inline (it is NOT a per-caliber URL). Bud's is requests-based (not Playwright); see the scraper for why the Playwright redirect guard does not apply. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 pilot, 2026-06-14.
